title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid
text:
Type: Label
Example:
batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: "$UID"
Used on: Jobs and Pods controlled by Jobs
This label is used as a programmatic way to get all Pods corresponding to a Job.
The
controller-uid
is a unique identifier that gets set in the
selector
field so the Job
controller can get all the corresponding Pods.
